'''Seaan''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] who served as a member of [[Red Hand Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He participated in the [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|capture]] of [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']] alongside [[Bria Tharen]]. At the [[Battle of Toprawa]], he, along with Red Hand, were completely wiped out as they formed the rearguard for the theft of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
